records.question: Which things of type_of_thing_code 'Commen' with service_details exactly 'Satisfied' that have related customer_events, timed_status_of_things, and timed_locations_of_things records also have a timed_locations_of_things record dated exactly '2016-12-29 00:39:19'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM Things things
JOIN Customer_Events customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN Timed_Status_of_Things timed_status ON things.thing_id = timed_status.thing_id
JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things timed_locations ON things.thing_id = timed_locations.thing_id
WHERE things.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Commen'
  AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
  AND timed_locations.Date_and_Time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19'

records.question: Which electronics have a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied on 2016-08-04 00:25:55 at location 94425 Nellie Kn, associated with Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM Things AS things
JOIN Services AS services ON things.service_type_code = services.service_type_code
JOIN Organizations AS organizations ON services.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS timed_locations ON things.thing_id = timed_locations.thing_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Check'
AND services.service_details = 'Satisfied'
AND timed_locations.Date_and_Time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55'
AND timed_locations.Location_Code = '94425 Nellie Kn'
AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'

records.question: Which things with a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied are associated with Denesik and Sons Party, where their services are Moving Out and also exactly Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Things.thing_id 
FROM Things 
JOIN Services ON Things.organization_id = Services.organization_id 
JOIN Residents_Services ON Services.service_id = Residents_Services.service_id 
JOIN Customer_Events ON Residents_Services.resident_id = Customer_Events.resident_id 
WHERE Things.service_type_code = 'Check' 
AND Things.service_details = 'Satisfied' 
AND Services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' 
AND Services.service_details = 'Satisfied' 
AND Customer_Events.thing_id IN (SELECT thing_id FROM Things WHERE organization_id = (SELECT organization_id FROM Organizations WHERE organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'))
